> [!IMPORTANT]

### Welcome to the Mohawk College webring!

> **READ BEFORE SUBMITTING** > Please review the following requirements to ensure your submission is smoothly added.
>
> ### Once you have verified these steps, you can delete this entire block of text and replace it with your actual pull request description.

- **Placement:** I have added my member object to the **absolute end** of the array in `members.json`.
- **Required Fields:** My member object includes valid `name`, `url`, `jobStatus`, `graduationYear`, and `tags` properties.
- **Job & Year:** My `jobStatus` and `graduationYear` properties perfectly match the exact strings/numbers allowed in `webring/src/types.ts`.
- **Tech Tags:** All technologies listed in my `tags` property exist exactly as written in the `techFiltersArray`.
- **New Tags (If Applicable):** If I introduced a new technology tag, I have also added it to the `techFiltersArray` inside `webring/src/types.ts`.
- **Valid JSON:** I have double-checked that my addition did not break the overall JSON syntax (e.g., missing commas, unclosed brackets).
- **Optional Email Property:** If I chose to add my email to my member object, I am okay with being sent an email whenever a new member is added, for the purposes of providing feedback to that new member. If in the future I want to opt out of this, I understand that I have to open a new pull request and remove my email property or alternatively you may contact a maintainer.
